p.strong: Durability vs. Speed: Choose Your Position on the Spectrum

g.text: DurabilityPerWrite DurabilityMode = iota // fsync every write

div.p: There is no "right" answer — only tradeoffs. The fsync decision is a CAP theorem choice:

ul.li: OS-managed = AP (available, may lose data) Most production systems choose batched with a small window, accepting that a crash might lose the last ~100ms of messages.

div.p: ZERO DATA LOSS Every acknowledged message survives

ul.li: fsync() every N writes or M ms

div.p: LOSE LAST BATCH Up to N messages or M ms of data
SECONDS TO MINUTES All unflushed data lost (depends on OS dirty page timeout)
